title: PhytoGraph taxonomy results review
study_boundary: No cross-track prediction or speculation entries were promoted beyond table headers, because the required validation predicates were not met.

substrate.accepted_name_policy: accepted names are operational join keys; synonym and source conflicts remain visible
substrate.evidence_policy: observed evidence, inferred fields, predicted fields, and missing data are separated

routes: What Evidence Would Change the Conclusion

tracks.label: Reticulation and polyploidy
tracks.plain_question: Where do plant histories depart from a simple branching tree?
tracks.field_focus: Reticulation evidence, chromosome/ploidy rows, hybridization rows, accepted-key projection.
tracks.public_result: Evidence was visible in sidecar records, but controlled accepted-name recovery did not support a promoted reticulation result.
tracks.key_counts: 22 GBIF event taxa; 11 source groups; 2 WFO-projected taxa; 0/17 matched-control event recovery
tracks.blocker: GBIF sidecar signal is not WFO-projected and source-density controls remain unresolved
tracks.future_data_required: Audited GBIF-to-WFO accepted-key projection or admitted sidecar namespace plus source-density controls preserving event signal
tracks.claim_boundary: No established reticulation hotspot, hybridization, or polyploid recovery claim
tracks.rejection_reason: Sidecar records did not clear controlled accepted-key recovery.

tracks.label: Ecological anachronisms
tracks.plain_question: Can lost animal-plant partnerships be detected from plant evidence?
tracks.field_focus: Canonical anachronism held-outs, modern dispersal-failure evidence, living-disperser controls.
tracks.public_result: No canonical held-out case passed the validation criteria with the available accepted-name evidence.
tracks.key_counts: 8 canonical held-outs; 31 local candidates; 0/8 canonical held-outs pass validation contract
tracks.blocker: Accepted-key modern-failure evidence, source-class support, and living-megafauna controls do not clear the validation contract
tracks.future_data_required: Accepted-key modern-failure evidence, multi-source/source-class support, living-megafauna controls, and source-class-independent held-out recovery
tracks.claim_boundary: No new anachronism, ghost-partner, or ecological-interaction claim
tracks.rejection_reason: Modern-failure and source-class support were insufficient.

tracks.label: Convergent traits
tracks.plain_question: Can repeated plant traits be separated from family size and sampling density?
tracks.field_focus: Trait carriers, family-size controls, sampling-density controls, projection-loss gates.
tracks.public_result: Trait signals remained inseparable from confounders, so convergence claims were not promoted.
tracks.key_counts: 3069 accepted-key trait carrier rows; 15 canonical traits; 0 controlled-ready traits
tracks.blocker: No trait separates convergence signal from family-size, sampling-density, projection-loss, and source gates
tracks.future_data_required: Broader trait coverage, phylogenetically separated carrier sets, and family-size/sampling-density controls

tracks.label: Crop wild relatives and climate
tracks.plain_question: Can crop relatives be ranked for climate substitution from local evidence?
tracks.field_focus: Crop-wild-relative rows, occurrence records, climate summaries, expert comparator rows.
tracks.public_result: Occurrences were recovered, but numeric climate summaries and comparator rows were absent.
tracks.key_counts: 3358 post-filter occurrence records; 0 numeric BIOCLIM vectors; 0 validation-allowed comparator rows
tracks.blocker: Coordinate recovery did not yield numeric local/free BIOCLIM vectors or disjoint expert comparator rows
tracks.future_data_required: Audited crop/CWR BIOCLIM summaries and disjoint candidate-level expert comparator rows
tracks.claim_boundary: No crop-substitution recommendation or climate-adaptation claim
tracks.rejection_reason: No numeric BIOCLIM vectors or validation-allowed comparators.

tracks.label: Chemodiversity
tracks.plain_question: Can under-screened plants be prioritized for chemistry from source-backed evidence?
tracks.field_focus: Compound-class rows, dated chemistry evidence, source-ablation checks.
tracks.public_result: The evidence remained dominated by one source family, so chemistry predictions were not promoted.
tracks.validated_branch_basis: non-Duke temporal chemistry review and source ablation
tracks.key_counts: Non-Duke temporal evidence insufficient; no validation-ready structured family/class stratum
tracks.blocker: Open non-Duke detections do not support a structured temporal family/class predictor rerun independent of Duke/source density
tracks.future_data_required: Accepted-key, dated, non-Duke taxon-compound rows across enough families/classes to estimate signatures without source collapse
tracks.claim_boundary: No new phytochemical, bioactivity, or screening-priority claim

tracks.label: Botanical model benchmark
tracks.plain_question: Can botanical reasoning questions be scored against audited local responses?
tracks.field_focus: Question bank, scoring rubric, response rows, scorer diagnostics.
tracks.public_result: The benchmark scaffold exists, but no audited local/open response set was available for scoring.
tracks.key_counts: 0 approved local/open model pairings; 0 executed responses; 0 scored responses
tracks.blocker: No approved local/open model and response set was available under the study constraints
tracks.future_data_required: Approved local/open model weights and documented response rows with scorer diagnostics
tracks.claim_boundary: No model error-rate, leaderboard, toxicity-look-alike, or vendor-comparison claim
tracks.rejection_reason: No audited response rows were produced.
